branding.name: Stage Ready Performance

hero.title: Stage Ready
hero.description: Intelligent strength and conditioning for dancers, athletes, and active adults through movement science, biomechanics, and artistry.

services.title: Dance
services.description: Ballet-specific strength and conditioning, pointe readiness, pre-professional development, and studio curriculum systems.

services.title: Sport
services.description: Performance systems for collegiate and high school athletes focused on speed, power, readiness, and injury reduction.

services.title: Personal Training
services.description: Evidence-based training for longevity, movement quality, strength, and overall health.

founder.title: Built on Performance, Artistry, and Science.
founder.description: Stage Ready Performance bridges the gap between movement artistry and modern sports science through evidence-based programming and elite-level coaching.
